overview: Mono-White Heroic in Pauper leverages the Heroic keyword to generate incremental value and board presence while applying steady pressure. By equipping cheap artifacts and casting creatures that trigger Heroic, the deck aims to outpace opponents before they can stabilize. The strategy relies on efficient resource usage and relentless attrition to secure victory.
win_conditions: Wearing down the opponent's life total through repeated Heroic triggers and equipped creatures
Establishing an unblockable or heavily buffed threat that closes out the game
Outlasting the opponent through efficient card advantage and board control

keep_criteria: Hands with early creatures that can trigger Heroic
Hands containing cheap equipment or +1/+1 counters
Hands with a mix of lands and one-drop threats
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early plays or land drops
Hands heavy on late-game cards without early interaction
Hands with multiple lands or zero creatures

early_game: Play lands and one-drop creatures to establish board presence
Trigger Heroic immediately with cheap equipment or spells
Apply pressure while searching for key synergies
mid_game: Scale threats using Emerge Unscathed and Ethereal Armor
Maintain board control by trading efficiently
Look for combat tricks to push damage through
late_game: Consolidate board state with larger threats
Use accumulated +1/+1 counters to overwhelm blockers
Close out the game with direct damage or unblockable attackers

key_cards.name: Ethereal Armor
key_cards.role: Provides a cheap way to add +1/+1 counters and trigger Heroic
key_cards.notes: Cast on creatures that can immediately trigger Heroic or will survive to grow

key_cards.name: Emerge Unscathed
key_cards.role: Generates multiple +1/+1 counters and triggers Heroic repeatedly
key_cards.notes: Use when you have multiple creatures on board to maximize value and board presence

key_cards.name: Hyena Umbra
key_cards.role: Offers a resilient early threat with lifelink and evasion potential
key_cards.notes: Prioritize casting early to trigger Heroic and apply steady pressure while gaining life

sequencing_tips: Cast equipment or counter-granting spells after declaring attackers to maximize Heroic triggers
Hold up mana for combat tricks to surprise opponents and push unexpected damage
Prioritize keeping creatures alive to compound +1/+1 counters over multiple turns

matchups.advice: Play defensively early and use Heroic triggers to stabilize
watch_for: Board wipes that clear your counters

matchups.advice: Push damage quickly before they establish counterspells
watch_for: Card draw engines that outvalue you

matchups.advice: Trade efficiently and avoid giving them free turns
watch_for: Large threats that outscale your board
Removal spells that target your key creatures

common_threats: Direct damage spells that bypass your blockers
Counterspells that disrupt your key plays
